name: PdfViewer
description: Inline PDF document viewer powered by pdf.js — page navigation, zoom controls, optional text search, and download.
gotchas: pdf.js and its worker are loaded at runtime from jsDelivr (CDN) the first time a PdfViewer mounts. For strict-CSP or air-gapped deployments, self-host them and set window.lumeoCdn = { pdfJs: '/your/pdf.min.mjs', pdfJsWorker: '/your/pdf.worker.min.mjs' } before the first PdfViewer renders, or run `lumeo deps install --lib pdfjs` (CLI). See /docs/cdn-deps.

api.name: PdfViewer
api.description: Inline PDF document viewer powered by pdf.js — page navigation, zoom controls, optional text search, and download.

parameters.name: Src
parameters.description: URL of the PDF document to load (loaded by pdf.js via fetch). A quiet "No PDF loaded" placeholder renders while this is empty.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: The currently displayed 1-based page number. Clamped to [1, totalPages] on render; two-way bindable via PageChanged.

parameters.name: PageChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the displayed page changes (navigation buttons, page-number entry, keyboard, or a search jumping to a match's page).

parameters.name: Zoom
parameters.description: Zoom factor (1.0 = 100%), clamped to [0.5, 4.0]. Ignored when FitMode is not Custom. Two-way bindable via ZoomChanged.

parameters.name: ZoomChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the zoom level changes (zoom buttons, keyboard, or a FitMode switch).

parameters.name: FitMode
parameters.description: Fit-to-container mode that overrides Zoom when set to a non-Custom value. FitWidth scales the page so its width matches the scroll-parent's clientWidth (minus a 16px padding for breathing room before the scrollbar). FitPage scales so the whole page fits within the scroll-parent's box. JS computes the ratio on each render, so a container resize that triggers OnParametersSet re-renders the page at the new fit. Set back to Custom to return control to the numeric Zoom value.

parameters.name: ShowToolbar
parameters.description: Shows the toolbar bar (page nav, search, zoom, download). Default true; when false only the document viewport renders.

parameters.name: ShowPageNav
parameters.description: Shows the previous/next page buttons and page-number input in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowZoomControls
parameters.description: Shows the zoom out/percentage/in controls in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowDownload
parameters.description: Shows a download link (rendered only once Src is set) in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Shows the in-document search box and match navigation in the toolbar. Default false.

parameters.name: HighlightColor
parameters.description: CSS color used for search-match highlight overlays (blended via color-mix; the active match renders more opaque). Default "yellow".

parameters.name: OnLoaded
parameters.description: Raised once, after the document successfully loads, with its total page count.

parameters.name: OnPageChanged
parameters.description: Fires alongside PageChanged; provided for symmetry with the OnLoaded/OnError event naming.

parameters.name: OnError
parameters.description: Fires when the underlying JS load/render fails (CDN unreachable, malformed PDF, worker init failure, …). Receives the exception message. Consumers can use this to surface their own error UI; the built-in EmptyState fallback renders regardless.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root panel.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root panel.

events.name: PageChanged
events.description: Raised when the displayed page changes (navigation buttons, page-number entry, keyboard, or a search jumping to a match's page).

events.name: ZoomChanged
events.description: Raised when the zoom level changes (zoom buttons, keyboard, or a FitMode switch).

events.name: OnLoaded
events.description: Raised once, after the document successfully loads, with its total page count.

events.name: OnPageChanged
events.description: Fires alongside PageChanged; provided for symmetry with the OnLoaded/OnError event naming.

events.name: OnError
events.description: Fires when the underlying JS load/render fails (CDN unreachable, malformed PDF, worker init failure, …). Receives the exception message. Consumers can use this to surface their own error UI; the built-in EmptyState fallback renders regardless.

gotchas: pdf.js and its worker are loaded at runtime from jsDelivr (CDN) the first time a PdfViewer mounts. For strict-CSP or air-gapped deployments, self-host them and set window.lumeoCdn = { pdfJs: '/your/pdf.min.mjs', pdfJsWorker: '/your/pdf.worker.min.mjs' } before the first PdfViewer renders, or run `lumeo deps install --lib pdfjs` (CLI). See /docs/cdn-deps.

mdSummary:
# PdfViewer

Inline PDF document viewer powered by pdf.js — page navigation, zoom controls, optional text search, and download.

**Package:** `Lumeo.PdfViewer` · **Category:** Data Display
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pdf-viewer

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PdfViewer | Src | `string?` | `` | URL of the PDF document to load (loaded by pdf.js via fetch). A quiet "No PDF loaded" placeholder renders while this is empty. |
| PdfViewer | Page | `int` | `1` | The currently displayed 1-based page number. Clamped to [1, totalPages] on render; two-way bindable via PageChanged. |
| PdfViewer | PageChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` | Raised when the displayed page changes (navigation buttons, page-number entry, keyboard, or a search jumping to a match's page). |
| PdfViewer | Zoom | `double` | `1.0` | Zoom factor (1.0 = 100%), clamped to [0.5, 4.0]. Ignored when FitMode is not Custom. Two-way bindable via ZoomChanged. |
| PdfViewer | ZoomChanged | `EventCallback<double>` | `` | Raised when the zoom level changes (zoom buttons, keyboard, or a FitMode switch). |
| PdfViewer | FitMode | `PdfFitMode` | `PdfFitMode.Custom` | Fit-to-container mode that overrides Zoom when set to a non-Custom value. FitWidth scales the page so its width matches the scroll-parent's clientWidth (minus a 16px padding for breathing room before the scrollbar). FitPage scales so the whole page fits within the scroll-parent's box. JS computes the ratio on each render, so a container resize that triggers OnParametersSet re-renders the page at the new fit. Set back to Custom to return control to the numeric Zoom value. |
| PdfViewer | ShowToolbar | `bool` | `true` | Shows the toolbar bar (page nav, search, zoom, download). Default true; when false only the document viewport renders. |
| PdfViewer | ShowPageNav | `bool` | `true` | Shows the previous/next page buttons and page-number input in the toolbar. Default true. |
| PdfViewer | ShowZoomControls | `bool` | `true` | Shows the zoom out/percentage/in controls in the toolbar. Default true. |
| PdfViewer | ShowDownload | `bool` | `true` | Shows a download link (rendered only once Src is set) in the toolbar. Default true. |
| PdfViewer | ShowSearch | `bool` | `false` | Shows the in-document search box and match navigation in the toolbar. Default false. |
| PdfViewer | HighlightColor | `string` | `"yellow"` | CSS color used for search-match highlight overlays (blended via color-mix; the active match renders more opaque). Default "yellow". |
| PdfViewer | OnLoaded | `EventCallback<int>` | `` | Raised once, after the document successfully loads, with its total page count. |
| PdfViewer | OnPageChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` | Fires alongside PageChanged; provided for symmetry with the OnLoaded/OnError event naming. |
| PdfViewer | OnError | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fires when the underlying JS load/render fails (CDN unreachable, malformed PDF, worker init failure, …). Receives the exception message. Consumers can use this to surface their own error UI; the built-in EmptyState fallback renders regardless. |
| PdfViewer | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root panel. |
| PdfViewer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root panel. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `PageChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`) — Raised when the displayed page changes (navigation buttons, page-number entry, keyboard, or a search jumping to a match's page).
- `ZoomChanged` (`EventCallback<double>`) — Raised when the zoom level changes (zoom buttons, keyboard, or a FitMode switch).
- `OnLoaded` (`EventCallback<int>`) — Raised once, after the document successfully loads, with its total page count.
- `OnPageChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`) — Fires alongside PageChanged; provided for symmetry with the OnLoaded/OnError event naming.
- `OnError` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Fires when the underlying JS load/render fails (CDN unreachable, malformed PDF, worker init failure, …). Receives the exception message. Consumers can use this to surface their own error UI; the built-in EmptyState fallback renders regardless.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<PdfViewer />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/PdfViewer/PdfViewer.razor`
